description: Learn how to boil pasta correctly to achieve the perfect texture.

steps.instruction: Bring water to a rolling boil.
steps.tip: Use a large pot and plenty of water to prevent sticking.

steps.instruction: Add salt to the boiling water.
steps.tip: Salt enhances the flavor of the pasta.

steps.instruction: Add the pasta and stir occasionally.
steps.example: Cook according to package instructions until al dente.

steps.tip: Reserve some pasta water for sauces if needed.

milestones: Successfully boil pasta to the desired texture.
